<!-- Sanctum docs PR template. Keep it short. -->

## What changed

One to three sentences. What does this page now say that it didn't before, or what new page did you add?

## CONTRIBUTING checklist

Tick each box. CI runs `scripts/contrib-check.py` against the files you changed — it will fail the PR if any box below is a lie.

- [ ] **Voice** — technical fact → human observation formula, no marketing, no buzzwords.
- [ ] **Five-Minute Rule** — the page fits in ≤ 1200 prose words, or the overrun is justified in the PR description.
- [ ] **Hero image** — every page has one, pencil-sketch style, teal or amber halo, real PNG, alt text with personality.
- [ ] **No emojis** in prose (Holocron portal is the only exception).
- [ ] **Haus, not house** where the sentence is about *this specific dwelling* (product names, file paths, and idioms stay untouched — see CONTRIBUTING).
- [ ] **Real values** in code blocks — no `example.com`, no `YOUR_TOKEN_HERE`, no placeholders.
- [ ] **Sidebar updated** (`astro.config.mjs`) if this is a new page.

## Tommy Standard

Would Tommy (the dead cat with strong opinions on network segmentation) sign off on this? If not, keep editing. You don't have to be Tommy. Tommy just has to not be embarrassed by you.
